questions.question: What was your overall impression of the product?
questions.answer: It seems... functional, I guess? I'm a little confused about how I got logged in without actually logging in. It also seems like I can manage tasks here which is what I need.

questions.question: What was the most confusing part?
questions.answer: Definitely the login situation. I was immediately on the tasks page and it said 'Welcome back!', but I didn't see any login or registration options to begin with. It made me wonder if I was already logged in, and if so, how?
questions.insight: The lack of visible login/registration options is confusing.

questions.question: What was the most delightful part?
questions.answer: Hmm... I don't know if there was a *delightful* part exactly. I guess the filtering options looked pretty good? If they work well, that could be helpful.

questions.question: How would you feel if you could no longer use this product?
questions.insight: Need is there, but not strong.

questions.question: Would you use this again tomorrow? Why or why not?
questions.answer: Maybe. It seems like it *could* be useful for organizing my assignments, but the weird login experience makes me hesitant.
questions.insight: Utility is promising, but onboarding needs work.

questions.question: Who specifically would you recommend this to? What would you tell them?
questions.answer: Probably my friend Mark. He's always complaining about being disorganized. I'd tell him to check it out, but warn him about the confusing login stuff.

questions.question: What would you pay for this? What do you currently pay for alternatives?
questions.answer: If it worked really well and kept me organized, maybe $5 a month? Right now I'm just using a free to-do list app.

questions.question: What would need to change for you to commit to using this regularly?
questions.answer: Definitely the login/registration process. It needs to be clear and straightforward. Also, a tutorial or something would be nice to explain all the features.
questions.insight: Improved onboarding and a better login experience are crucial.

questions.question: What's missing that you expected to find?
questions.answer: Login/Registration options on the main Tasks page. Like, front and center. It's kind of the most basic thing!

questions.question: How does this compare to [competitor/alternative]?
questions.answer: I don't know, I haven't really used anything that does *exactly* this. My free to-do list is much simpler, but at least I know how to log in and out!
questions.insight: Difficult to compare without direct competitors used.

questions.question: What was your "aha moment" if any?
questions.answer: No, not really. It was more like a "huh?" moment when I couldn't find the login.

questions.question: On a scale of 1-10, how likely are you to recommend this?
questions.answer: Probably a 5. It has potential, but the login thing is a big problem.
questions.insight: Net Promoter Score is low due to usability issues.
